text.title: AIOps Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the AIOps platform config artefact plus valid / invalid / forbidden examples.

section.title: Schema
Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: dynamic_thresholds_tied_to_slo == false (static thresholds in production AIOps rejected)
rca_output_includes missing any of [ranked_causes, timeline, scope, logs_traces]

example.title: Static threshold + auto p1 (forbidden)
example.note: Multiple forbidden patterns triggered; reject and re-request.

text.reference: Validator script that enforces this contract.
